entry.title: New IDC SAQMMA13D0120 awarded to PAE GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $100,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF LIFE SUPPORT SERVICES INCLUDING FOOD, FUEL, POSTAL SUPPORT, SOLID WASTE, PROPERTY, RECREATION, AIRFIELD, FIRE PROTECTION, AND OTHER RELATED SUPPORT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
